column1: **Nx:** |br| Number of discretised domain elements in the |br| x (zonal) direction
**Ny:** |br| Number of discretised domain elements in the |br| y (meridional) direction
**Nz:** |br| Number of discretised domain elements in the |br| z (vertical) direction
**Nh:** |br| Number of halo cells to be used |br| (dependent on largest stencil extent)
**d_xi:** |br| Computational domain fixed resolution in the 'i' direction
**d_eta:** |br| Computational domain fixed resolution in the 'j' direction
**d_zeta:** |br| Computational domain fixed resolution in the 'k' direction
**coordHorizHalos:** |br| Switch to setup coordinate halos as periodic=1 or gradient-following=0
**topoFile:** |br| A file containing topography |br| (surface elevation in meters ASL)
**verticalDeformSwitch:** |br| Switch to use vertical coordinate deformation 0=off; 1=on
**verticalDeformQuadCoeff:** |br| Quadratic term coefficient in the deformation scheme
